title: Ship Encyclopedia
noData: No encyclopedia data yet. Pick a realm and load.
rarityHint: Official in-game card rarity (from GameParams RarityCategory): Common (white), Uncommon (green), Rare (blue), Epic (red), Legendary (orange).

detail.title: Ship Details
detail.gameparamsMissing: GameParams.data not unpacked. Run wowsunpack to see armor schemes and shell ballistics.
detail.gameparamsErrorTip: Failed to load armor & ballistics — click to copy error:
detail.gameparamsHint: Tip: place the unpacked GameParams.json at the game root (next to bin/). See https://github.com/wowsinfo/wowsunpack
detail.noSpecs: No specifications available for this ship.
detail.noModel: No 3D model baked for this ship yet. Run `just convert-ship --name <model>` + `just bake-model` to generate one.
detail.noMyStats: Bind an account and you have no battles in this ship yet.
detail.communityUnavailable: Community trend data source is not connected yet. This will show server-average winrate by version once a backend partner is wired in.
detail.ballisticsApprox: Penetration curves are an estimate derived from shell mass / airDrag / krupp — not the exact in-game model.
detail.noBallistics: No armor / ballistics data could be extracted from GameParams for this ship.

stage.hint3d: Drag to rotate · scroll to zoom · right-drag to pan

ballistics.sigmaHint: Tighter grouping — higher sigma means shells land closer to point of aim.
ballistics.horizontalDispHint: Maximum horizontal spread at the ship's gun range.
ballistics.delimRangeHint: Range at which the dispersion formula is anchored.
ballistics.massHint: Heavier shells retain velocity better at range.
ballistics.muzzleVelocityHint: Initial shell speed at the muzzle.
ballistics.airDragHint: How quickly the shell loses speed in flight. Lower = flatter trajectory.

spec.hpHint: Total damage the ship can take before sinking.
spec.torpProtectionHint: Reduces torpedo damage to the citadel. Higher is better.
spec.citadelArmorHint: Maximum thickness of the citadel's armoured box. Protects against AP shells reaching the magazines/engine.
spec.bowArmorHint: Thickness of the extremities. Determines whether HE shells shatter and whether overmatch occurs.
spec.mainGunRangeHint: Maximum firing distance of the main battery.
spec.mainGunReloadHint: Time between full broadsides. Lower is better.
spec.mainGunCaliberHint: Shell diameter. Determines HE penetration (≈ caliber/6, or /4 for German HE) and AP overmatch.
spec.mainGunSigmaHint: Accuracy parameter — higher means tighter grouping.
spec.turretTraverseHint: Time to rotate turrets 180°. Lower is better.
spec.heShellHint: High-explosive per-shell damage. Causes fires and damages lightly-armoured targets.
spec.sapShellHint: Semi-armor-piercing — high damage vs light/medium armour, no fires.
spec.apShellHint: Armour-piercing per-shell damage. Highest damage against broadside armoured targets.
spec.shellSpeedHint: Initial shell speed. Higher = flatter trajectory, shorter lead time.
spec.hePenetrationHint: Armor HE can penetrate without shattering. Roughly caliber/6 (German: caliber/4).
spec.fireChanceHint: Per-shell probability of starting a fire.
spec.torpDetectHint: Distance at which torpedoes become visible to the enemy. Lower gives less reaction time.
spec.rudderShiftHint: Time for the rudder to fully deflect. Lower = more agile.
spec.turningRadiusHint: Smaller radius = tighter turns. Affects dodging torpedoes and shells.
spec.surfaceDetectHint: Distance at which enemy surface ships spot you. Lower is better (stealthier).
spec.airDetectHint: Distance at which enemy aircraft spot you.

skills.title: Captain Skill Builder
skills.locked: Locked — needs {n} points in lower tiers
skills.noTree: No skill tree for this ship type yet.

techTree.title: Tech Tree
techTree.empty: No tech tree for this nation.

shipyard.healthHint: Tune the HP slider to see the effect of trigger-type skills (e.g. Adrenaline Rush).
